subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Lord of lords, for that Thou hast burned away the veils with the fire of love; and all praise be unto Thee, for that I have been attracted
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا رب الارباب بما احرقت الاحجاب بنار الانجذاب و اجذبتنی حراره
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
